title: Upload valid image via file picker and start extraction
description: Verifies a user can browse-upload a supported image and the app shows a loading skeleton during palette extraction.
category: Image upload by click or drag and drop

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid PNG or JPEG image under 10 MB using the file picker
Verify a loading skeleton is displayed while extraction runs
Verify extracted palette swatches are displayed

title: Extract and display source image with swatch grid
description: Verifies a supported image produces a displayed source image and an extracted swatch grid with color values.
category: Palette extraction and display

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image under 10 MB using the file picker
Wait for extraction to complete
Verify the uploaded source image is displayed
Verify extracted palette swatches with color values are displayed

title: Copy a single color value from the extracted palette
description: Users can copy an individual swatch value and receive a success toast confirming the value was copied.
category: Color format switching and copy actions

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image file using the file picker
Wait for the palette extraction to complete
Click a swatch value to copy it
Verify a success toast is visible confirming the copy action

title: Copy all displayed palette values at once
description: Users can copy all currently displayed swatch values with Copy All and receive a success toast confirming the copy action.
category: Color format switching and copy actions

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image file using the file picker
Wait for the palette extraction to complete
Click the Copy All action
Verify a success toast is visible confirming the copy action

title: Switch palette output format to RGB after extracting colors
description: Users can switch the displayed palette values to RGB after a successful extraction and see all swatches update accordingly.
category: Color format switching and copy actions

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image file using the file picker
Wait for the palette extraction to complete
Switch the output format to RGB
Verify the displayed swatch values are shown in RGB format

title: Reset to upload state with Upload new image
description: Verifies a user can clear the current extraction and return to an empty upload state ready for a new file.
category: Palette extraction and display

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image under 10 MB using the file picker
Wait for extraction to complete
Choose Upload new image
Verify the image upload dropzone is displayed
Verify extracted palette swatches are not displayed

title: Open Export CSS modal and copy CSS variables snippet
description: Users can open the CSS export modal, copy the CSS variables snippet, and close the modal to return to the palette.
category: Palette export

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image file using the file picker
Wait for the palette extraction to complete
Open the Export CSS modal
Copy the export snippet from the modal
Close the modal
Verify the extracted palette swatches are displayed on the page

title: Open Export JSON modal, copy snippet, and download JSON file
description: Users can open the JSON export modal, copy the JSON snippet, and download the JSON export file from the modal.
category: Palette export

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image file using the file picker
Wait for the palette extraction to complete
Open the Export JSON modal
Copy the export snippet from the modal
Download the JSON export file from the modal
Verify the browser indicates a file download was initiated

title: Open palette tool from landing page
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the landing page CTA to the palette tool and see the upload area.
category: Landing page navigation

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call-to-action to open the palette tool
Verify the user lands on the palette page
Verify the image upload dropzone is displayed

title: Copy All reflects the currently selected output format
description: Users can switch the output format and then use Copy All to copy values in that format with success feedback.
category: Color format switching and copy actions

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image file using the file picker
Wait for the palette extraction to complete
Switch the output format to HSL
Click the Copy All action
Verify a success toast is visible confirming the copy action

title: Drag-and-drop upload shows drag-active only while dragging
description: Verifies drag-and-drop upload shows drag-active UI during drag and then proceeds to extraction after drop.
category: Image upload by click or drag and drop

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Drag a valid image file over the dropzone without releasing it
Move the dragged file away from the dropzone without dropping it
Drag the valid image file over the dropzone again and drop it
Verify a loading skeleton is displayed while extraction runs
Verify extracted palette swatches are displayed

title: Open Export Tailwind modal and copy Tailwind config snippet
description: Users can open the Tailwind export modal, copy the Tailwind config snippet, and close the modal successfully.
category: Palette export

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image file using the file picker
Wait for the palette extraction to complete
Open the Export Tailwind modal
Copy the export snippet from the modal
Close the modal
Verify the extracted palette swatches are displayed on the page

title: Open palette tool from alternate landing CTA
description: Verifies a visitor can use the alternate landing CTA to reach the palette tool and see supported file guidance.
category: Landing page navigation

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the secondary call-to-action to try the tool
Verify the user lands on the palette page
Verify supported file guidance is displayed near the upload area

title: Switch from RGB to HSL without re-uploading and keep the palette visible
description: Users can change formats multiple times after extraction and still see the palette update without losing the extracted swatches.
category: Color format switching and copy actions

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image file using the file picker
Wait for the palette extraction to complete
Switch the output format to RGB
Switch the output format to HSL
Verify the displayed swatch values are shown in HSL format

title: Show error state for corrupted image
description: Verifies a corrupted or broken image file results in a visible error state indicating the image could not be processed.
category: Palette extraction and display

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a corrupted image file using the file picker
Verify a visible error state is displayed indicating the image could not be processed
Verify extracted palette swatches are not displayed

title: Export snippet content updates after changing the palette format and reopening export
description: After switching the palette output format, reopening an export modal shows an updated snippet aligned with the current palette state.
category: Palette export

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image file using the file picker
Wait for the palette extraction to complete
Open the Export CSS modal
Close the modal
Switch the output format to RGB
Open the Export CSS modal
Verify the export snippet is displayed and reflects the current palette state

title: Reject unsupported file type
description: Verifies uploading a non-image file is rejected with a visible unsupported file type message and no extraction starts.
category: Image upload by click or drag and drop

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a non-image file using the file picker
Verify rejected-file messaging for unsupported file type is displayed
Verify the app remains in the upload state without showing extracted swatches

title: Reject oversized image over 10 MB
description: Verifies uploading an image larger than 10 MB is rejected with a visible size limit message and no extraction starts.
category: Image upload by click or drag and drop

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload an image file larger than 10 MB using the file picker
Verify rejected-file messaging for oversized file is displayed
Verify the app remains in the upload state without showing extracted swatches

title: Handle single-color or very small image output
description: Verifies a very small or single-color image results in either at least one swatch or a clear empty-state outcome after extraction.
category: Palette extraction and display

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a very small or single-color image under 10 MB using the file picker
Wait for extraction to complete
Verify either extracted palette swatches are displayed or an empty state is displayed indicating no dominant colors were identified

title: Copy action shows failure feedback when clipboard is not available
description: When copying is not permitted by the environment, the UI shows a failure toast instead of a success confirmation.
category: Color format switching and copy actions

steps.description: Navigate to /palette
Upload a valid image file using the file picker
Wait for the palette extraction to complete
Click a swatch value to copy it
Verify a failure toast is visible indicating the copy did not succeed
